layout.mt_disclaimer: The English version of this document is legally authoritative.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to AlmaMesh. By using AlmaMesh, you agree to these terms.
terms.s1_p1: By accessing or using AlmaMesh, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use AlmaMesh.
terms.s2_p1: AlmaMesh is a free, local-first Vedic astrology app that runs entirely in your web browser. The chart engine runs on your device (in WebAssembly); there is no AlmaMesh backend server and no database we control. AlmaMesh requires no account, no login, no password, and no email sign-up — "profiles" are simply names you save locally on this device. Your birth details and charts are stored only in this browser and are never transmitted to or stored on any server operated by AlmaMesh.
terms.s3_p1: AlmaMesh is for entertainment and self-reflection purposes only.
terms.s3_li1: Our astrological interpretations are NOT professional advice
terms.s3_li2: We do NOT provide medical, legal, financial, or psychological guidance
terms.s3_li3: Astrological readings should NOT replace professional consultation
terms.s3_li4: You should NOT make important life decisions based solely on our interpretations
terms.s3_p2: By using AlmaMesh, you acknowledge that astrology is a belief system, not a science, and that interpretations are generated by AI based on traditional astrological principles.
terms.s4_li1: AlmaMesh is free. There is no payment, subscription, fee, or billing of any kind.
terms.s4_li2: There are no accounts, logins, passwords, or registration — nothing to sign up for and nothing for us to suspend or terminate.
terms.s4_li3: Profiles you create are local names stored only on this device; you control them and can delete them at any time.
terms.s4_li4: AlmaMesh is intended for users aged 13 and older.
terms.s5_li1: Use AlmaMesh for any illegal purpose
terms.s5_li2: Attempt to defeat, tamper with, or bypass the signed astronomy bundle or the on-device engine
terms.s5_li3: Redistribute the app in a way that misrepresents its origin or removes these terms
terms.s6_p1: AI-generated interpretation and chat are entirely optional and are never required to draw a chart.
terms.s6_li1: AI features work only if you choose to configure an OpenAI-compatible endpoint (for example, OpenRouter or your own).
terms.s6_li2: When you use them, your (PII-redacted) prompt is sent to the third-party endpoint you chose and is subject to that provider's terms and privacy policy, not ours.
terms.s6_li3: AI output is probabilistic and may be inaccurate; treat it as entertainment, consistent with the disclaimer above.
terms.s7_li1: AlmaMesh and its content are protected by copyright and trademark laws
terms.s7_li2: Your generated charts and interpretations are for personal use only
terms.s7_li3: You retain ownership of any personal data you enter; it stays on your device
terms.s8_p1: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW:
terms.s8_li1: AlmaMesh is provided "AS IS" without warranties of any kind
terms.s8_li2: We are NOT liable for any damages arising from your use of AlmaMesh
terms.s8_li3: We are NOT responsible for decisions you make based on astrological readings
terms.s8_li4: Because AlmaMesh is free, our total liability shall not exceed zero dollars (US$0)
terms.s9_p1: We may modify or discontinue AlmaMesh at any time without notice. Because the app runs locally, a copy you have already installed continues to work offline regardless of any change to what we publish.
terms.s10_p1: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of California, United States, without regard to conflict of law provisions.
terms.s11_p1: Any disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration in California, except where prohibited by law.
terms.s12_p1: We may update these terms. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: AlmaMesh ("we", "our", "us") is built to protect your privacy by keeping your data on your device. AlmaMesh runs entirely in your web browser, with no AlmaMesh backend server and no database we control. This Privacy Policy explains the few things that touch the network and what stays local.
privacy.s1_heading: 1. Your Data Stays on Your Device
privacy.s1_sub1_li1_text: Names you save for charts — stored only in this browser, never sent to us
privacy.s1_sub1_li2_text: Date, time, and place of birth, used on-device to compute your chart and stored only in this browser
privacy.s1_sub1_li3_text: Questions you ask and interpretations you receive, stored only in this browser
privacy.s1_sub2_li1_text: All of the above is held in your browser's local storage (IndexedDB / OPFS) on this device
privacy.s1_sub2_li2_text: None of it is transmitted to or stored on any server operated by AlmaMesh — we hold nothing about you
privacy.s2_p1: AlmaMesh makes the network do only two things:
privacy.s2_li1: Delivery only: downloading the app and a signed, content-addressed astronomy bundle (the DE421 ephemeris and program files) so the engine can run offline afterward. This is a one-way download; it carries no personal data about you.
privacy.s2_li2: Optional AI: if you choose to enable AI interpretation or chat, your prompt is sent to an AI endpoint — see the next section.
privacy.s2_li5: Operate accounts, logins, or collect your email — there is nothing to sign up for
privacy.s2_li6: Collect, store, or process your birth details or charts on our servers
privacy.s2_li7: Sell your data, track you across sites, or run targeted advertising
privacy.s3_li1: AI interpretation and chat are optional and are never required to draw a chart. They work only if YOU configure an OpenAI-compatible endpoint (for example, OpenRouter or your own).
privacy.s3_li2: When you use AI, your prompt is PII-redacted and fail-closed, then sent to the third-party endpoint YOU chose. That request goes to that provider — not to AlmaMesh — and is subject to THEIR privacy policy and terms, not ours.
privacy.s3_li3: If you never configure an endpoint, no prompt ever leaves your device. The chart engine itself is zero-egress.
privacy.s4_p1: AlmaMesh uses no advertising or analytics trackers and no third-party cookies. The only browser storage it uses is the local storage described above, which exists solely to make the app work offline on your device.
privacy.s5_p1: Because your birth data never leaves your device, you are always in direct control of it:
privacy.s5_li1_text: Everything AlmaMesh holds about you is visible in the app on this device — we hold nothing on a server.
privacy.s5_li2_text: Remove a profile or chart in Settings, or clear your browser's site data / uninstall the app. See the Data Deletion page.
privacy.s5_li3_text: Your data lives in standard browser storage on your device, under your control.
privacy.s6_li1: Your data lives on your device until you delete it; we hold nothing on a server to retain or expire.
privacy.s6_li2: Deletion is immediate and local — removing it from this browser removes it everywhere it ever existed.
privacy.s7_p1: AlmaMesh is not intended for users under 13 years of age.
privacy.s8_p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will post the new policy on this page with an updated effective date.

data_deletion.title: Data Deletion Instructions
data_deletion.intro: Your AlmaMesh data lives only on your device — there is no AlmaMesh server holding a copy. So deleting your data means removing it from this browser. There is nothing for AlmaMesh to delete on a server.
data_deletion.opt1_heading: Option 1: Delete a Profile or Chart In-App (Recommended)
data_deletion.opt1_li4_prefix: Select the profile or chat and choose
data_deletion.opt1_p1: The selected profile, its chart, and its chat history are removed from this browser immediately.
data_deletion.opt2_heading: Option 2: Clear All Data at Once
data_deletion.opt2_p1: To remove everything, clear AlmaMesh's site data in your browser or uninstall the app:
data_deletion.opt2_p2: Either of these wipes all AlmaMesh data on this device:
data_deletion.opt2_li1: Clear site data / cookies and storage for AlmaMesh in your browser settings
data_deletion.opt2_li2: Uninstall the AlmaMesh app (PWA) from your device
data_deletion.opt2_p3: This is instant and final — there is no server copy to follow up on.
data_deletion.deleted_p1: Deleting in-app or clearing site data removes from this browser:
data_deletion.deleted_li2: Your birth chart data and interpretations
data_deletion.deleted_li4: Your saved preferences (including any AI endpoint you configured)
data_deletion.deleted_li5: The cached astronomy bundle and app files
data_deletion.retention_li1: Nothing. AlmaMesh holds no copy of your data on any server, so there is nothing for us to retain after you delete.
data_deletion.retention_li2: Once removed from this browser, your data no longer exists anywhere.
